# Koin

> Koin is a Nuxt 4 SPA for expense tracking, tax reporting, and Mercury bank CSV import. It uses NuxtHub for SQLite persistence, KV for settings, and Nuxt UI for components.

This file serves as a curated map for LLMs to understand the Koin codebase, its architecture, and its core dependencies. Use the links below to navigate the technical documentation.

## Documentation Index

- [Full Consolidated Context (llms-full.txt)](llms-full.txt): Comprehensive technical background including PRD, Database Schema, and API specifications.
- [Project Instructions (CLAUDE.md)](CLAUDE.md): Critical development rules, CLI commands, and architectural mandates.

## Optional

The following references provide deeper context on the external libraries and infrastructure used by Koin.

### External References
- [Nuxt 4 Documentation](https://nuxt.com/llms.txt): Core framework features and Vue 3 Composition API patterns.
- [NuxtHub Documentation](https://hub.nuxt.com/llms.txt): Serverless infrastructure for D1, KV, and Blob storage.
- [Nuxt UI Documentation](https://ui.nuxt.com/llms.txt): Component library for styling and interactive elements.
- [Mercury API Reference](https://docs.mercury.com/llms.txt): Documentation for the Mercury banking API.
- [Drizzle ORM Documentation](https://orm.drizzle.team/llms.txt): TypeScript ORM for SQLite/D1.
- [Tailwind CSS Documentation](https://tailwindcss.com/docs): Utility-first CSS framework for custom styling.

### Core Documentation (Deep Links)
- [NuxtHub D1 Database](https://hub.nuxt.com/raw/docs/database.md): Database management and CLI usage.
- [NuxtHub KV Storage](https://hub.nuxt.com/raw/docs/kv/usage.md): Key-Value store SDK and CRUD operations.
- [NuxtHub Blob Storage](https://hub.nuxt.com/raw/docs/blob/usage.md): File upload and management for receipts.
- [Drizzle SQLite Guide](https://orm.drizzle.team/docs/get-started/sqlite-new): Schema definition and query building for SQLite.
- [Drizzle D1 Connection](https://orm.drizzle.team/docs/connect-cloudflare-d1): Configuration for Cloudflare D1.
- [Nuxt UI Form & Validation](https://ui.nuxt.com/raw/docs/components/form.md): Handling expense and contractor inputs.
- [Nuxt UI Data Table](https://ui.nuxt.com/raw/docs/components/table.md): Displaying and filtering expense records.
- [Nuxt UI Modal](https://ui.nuxt.com/raw/docs/components/modal.md): Implementation of dialogs and confirm prompts.
- [Nuxt UI Navigation](https://ui.nuxt.com/raw/docs/components/navigation-menu.md): App layout and tab-based navigation.
- [Nuxt UI Date Picker](https://ui.nuxt.com/raw/docs/components/popover.md): Implementation of the calendar-based date selector.
- [Mercury Transactions API](https://docs.mercury.com/reference/transactions): Endpoint details for bank data fetching.
- [Mercury API Auth](https://docs.mercury.com/reference/authentication): Managing secure access to banking data.
